notes: Core Tetris mechanics work but lacks level progression/speed increase, no next-piece preview, scoring is non-standard (rowCount*10 instead of proper line-clear scoring), and the board is 12 wide instead of standard 10.
A solid, bug-free implementation based on a popular tutorial, but lacks difficulty progression (speed increase), hard drop, and block borders for better visual clarity.

Core falling, movement, rotation, line clearing, scoring, and restart work, but the board width is nonstandard, colors are mismatched to classic tetrominoes, there is no level progression or preview/hold, and game over just silently wipes the board.
